prompt: Create a full-body anime fantasy character illustration of a celestial sorceress wearing an elaborate midnight-blue astral magician outfit. The character is a graceful young woman with very long flowing pastel pink hair, standing centered in a confident elegant pose, holding a tall ornate wizard staff in her left hand. Her face should be softly obscured or featureless so the focus stays on the costume. She wears an oversized pointed witch hat in deep navy velvet, trimmed with pale lace, gold embroidery, dangling star charms, and a large blue gemstone brooch on the hatband. The outfit is a luxurious dark blue and black corset dress with gold constellation filigree, layered asymmetrical skirt panels, white lace ruffles, translucent pale underskirt, and a sweeping open cloak covered in astrological diagrams, star maps, crescent moons, circles, and fine gold linework. Add ornate gold chains, star pendants, blue sapphire-like jewels, celestial brooches, and delicate dangling charms across the chest, waist, sleeves, and skirt. Include flared sleeves with large white lace cuffs, black thigh-high stockings with garter straps, and high-heeled black ankle boots decorated with gold trim, blue gems, and star motifs. The staff should be long and metallic gold with a circular astrolabe-like head, crescent and orbit rings, dangling ornaments, and a large glowing blue crystal at the center. The background is a deep navy magical astrology circle: concentric golden rings, zodiac-like markings, constellations, hanging crescent moons, small stars, geometric celestial ornaments, and radiant points of light surrounding the character symmetrically. Use rich jewel tones, luminous gold accents, intricate line art, highly detailed lace and embroidery, dramatic fantasy fashion design, polished anime illustration style, soft glow, high contrast, centered composition, full outfit visible from hat to boots, no cropped limbs, no extra characters, no readable modern text, no watermark.
